PRISM_MOD_CHARACTER_PRISM_CHARACTER.desc: An optically wrong triangle. The yellow eye in the hole receives cosmic Wi-Fi, while three blue drills rotate where logic used to be. Starts with a special relic and sprinkles card rewards with very serious rainbow nonsense.
PRISM_MOD_CHARACTER_PRISM_CHARACTER.gold: Gold shines. Prism shines. Accounting has concluded.
PRISM_MOD_CHARACTER_PRISM_CHARACTER.even: The prism refracted death for a second. Legally, it is still alive.
PRISM_MOD_CHARACTER_PRISM_CHARACTER.arom: Burnt minerals, wet starlight, and legally unexplainable blueberry.
PRISM_MOD_CHARACTER_PRISM_CHARACTER.card: Prism cards can appear in card rewards.
